$comment: Registry of operation token types for the undo-selected-actions pane.

tokenTypes.undoAction: Restore previous config.json from captured state.
Remove the added PATH entry and restore previous PATH value.
Re-add the removed PATH entry from captured previous PATH value.

tokenTypes.description: Scheduled task creation for Spotify update watcher.
tokenTypes.undoAction: Unregister the scheduled task by name.

tokenTypes.description: Scheduled task removal for Spotify update watcher.
tokenTypes.undoAction: Re-register the scheduled task from captured XML definition.
Restore the shortcut file from captured backup.
Restore previous update state (re-enable Spotify auto-update).
Run spicetify restore to revert Spotify to pre-apply state.

tokenTypes.description: SpotX ad-blocking patch applied to Spotify.
tokenTypes.undoAction: Restore vanilla Spotify client files from captured backup.
Not reversible unless an explicit backup or snapshot exists. Spotify must be reinstalled manually.
Not reversible unless an explicit backup exists. Spicetify must be reinstalled manually.

tokenTypes.description: Full environment reset (removes Spotify, Spicetify, config, and all managed state).
tokenTypes.undoAction: Not reversible. Full reset removes all managed state; a complete reinstall is required.

tokenTypes.description: Spotify or Spicetify cache directory clearing.
tokenTypes.undoAction: Not reversible. Cache data is regenerated automatically by Spotify on next use.

tokenTypes.description: LibreSpot profile and application data removal.
tokenTypes.undoAction: Not reversible. LibreSpot data must be recreated by running the application again.
